name: modal
title: BTModal
description: Centred modal dialog with header (title + optional subtext + optional close button), optional content slot, and optional footer with checkbox plus secondary/primary action buttons. Backdrop click dismisses when `dismissable` is true. Three width presets: sm (500px), md (720px), lg (1042px).

files.content:
export { default as BTModal } from './BTModal.vue';
export type { BTModalProps, BTModalSize } from './BTModal.types';
